Company_Name: The name of the company involved in the partnership.
Partnership_Year: The year when the partnership took place.
Partner_Organization: The name of the organization that the company partnered with.
Partnership_Program: The specific program or initiative that was developed through the partnership.
Media_Coverage_Value: The estimated value of positive media coverage generated through the partnership.
Customer_Acquisition_Cost_Change: The percentage by which the cost of acquiring new customers changed due to the partnership.
Brand_Sentiment_Score_Change: The change in the company's brand sentiment scores as a result of the partnership.
